images.copyright: Sunrise at Lake Atitlán, Guatemala (© shayes17/Getty Images)
images.title: Echoes of a volcanic past
images.caption: Sunrise at Lake Atitlán, Guatemala
images.desc: Set in Guatemala's western highlands, Lake Atitlán fills a vast volcanic caldera. Its deep blue waters are framed by steep crater walls and the cone-shaped volcanoes Atitlán, Tolimán, and San Pedro. Wooden piers stretch into the still lake, emphasizing the contrast between its calm surface and the rugged terrain shaped by volcanic activity.
